# Royal Haven Hotel

> A 5-star luxury hotel located in New Delhi, India. Founded in 2005, Royal Haven Hotel offers 85 premium rooms and suites, award-winning fine dining, a full-service spa, swimming pool, conference facilities and complimentary airport transfers.

## About
Royal Haven Hotel was founded in 2005 by the Kapoor Group of Hospitality. Located at 12 MG Road, City Centre, New Delhi – 110001. Contact: +91-9876543210. Check-in: 2:00 PM. Check-out: 12:00 PM.

## Pages
- [Home](https://royal-haven-hotel.netlify.app/)
- [About Us](https://royal-haven-hotel.netlify.app/about.html)
- [Rooms & Suites](https://royal-haven-hotel.netlify.app/rooms.html)
- [Facilities](https://royal-haven-hotel.netlify.app/facilities.html)
- [Gallery](https://royal-haven-hotel.netlify.app/gallery.html)
- [Booking](https://royal-haven-hotel.netlify.app/booking.html)
- [Contact](https://royal-haven-hotel.netlify.app/contact.html)

## Rooms
- Deluxe Room — ₹4,999/night — King Bed, City View, Free WiFi
- Premium Suite — ₹8,499/night — King Bed, Lounge Area, Bathtub
- Royal Penthouse — ₹16,999/night — 2 Bedrooms, Private Terrace, Butler Service

## Facilities
- Zaika Restaurant — Award-winning fine dining
- Luxury Spa & Wellness Centre
- Temperature-controlled Swimming Pool
- Grand Conference Hall (300 guest capacity)
- Fitness Centre
- 24/7 Room Service
- Complimentary Airport Transfers
- Free High-Speed WiFi

## Awards
- Best Luxury Hotel 2024
- 12 National & International Hospitality Awards
